dag_desc: Fan-out / fan-in DAG. An init node writes a ratification receipt; two build nodes consume the receipt in parallel and each produce one artifact; an integrate node consumes both artifacts and produces a combined file; a terminal node consumes the combined file. Ordering is expressed entirely via consumes and produces.

tasks.desc: Write a ratification receipt that both build branches consume as their start gate.
Produce out/a.txt on the A branch once the init ratification receipt is on disk.
Produce out/b.txt on the B branch once the init ratification receipt is on disk.
Concatenate the A and B branch artifacts into a single combined file.
Terminal node that asserts the combined artifact is present and the DAG has converged.
